title: Ruarc's Vanilla Enhanced
description: Enhancing the Vanilla Game with a few tweaks based on the Vanilla Perfected Modpack, adding stuff like Waystones for our survival server
body:
### Aiming to enhance Minecraft while retaining that Vanilla feel!

This modpack is heavily based on the [Vanilla Perfected Modpack by demonjoeTV](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected), with some minor changes like Waystones and the Voice Chat Mod for an enhanced multiplayer experience.

I created this modpack to basically make it easier to update and maintain the mods me and my friends play with on our small server. It is not meant to be made public and only distributed amongst us few people.
